description: You are a procurement analyst consolidating messy invoice data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\invoices_messy.csv by mapping inconsistent vendor names to the official list in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\vendor_master.csv using fuzzy matching. Extract the Vendor_Canonical and Category columns and create a DAX measure named Spend_Share_Pct that calculates the percentage of total spend for each vendor. Produce a table visual displaying Vendor_Canonical, Category, Amount, and Spend_Share_Pct. Export the visual data to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\consolidated_spend.csv and save the Power BI report as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Vendor_Spend_Analysis.pbix.
